# Fold Component Notice

This directory contains compliance metadata for a fold/decompiler component
used by TITAN dialogue tooling.

## Attribution

- Upstream project: Pentagram
- Upstream repository: https://github.com/pentagram-u8/pentagram
- Copyright holder(s): The Pentagram Team and contributors

## License

The fold-derived component is licensed under the GNU General Public License,
version 2 or (at your option) any later version (GPL-2.0-or-later).

A copy of the GPL license text is distributed as COPYING in this directory.

## Distribution scope

This notice applies to the fold-derived component and related artifacts.
The broader TITAN project remains MIT-licensed except where third-party
components specify different terms.

## Source provenance

See SOURCE_MAPPING.md for the exact branch/commit and build entry points used
for the currently bundled fold binary.
